description:
Frogger user!!

I feel a little better so I'll make a bot!! Gundham is delayed for now, but it will be soon (I hope...)

I'm running out of bot ideas (I didn't have any to begin with) so if anyone wants one, don't forget that there is a form for a request (it's mentioned in my profile in highlighted text.)

The idea for this bot came to me by accident when I was watched various horror stories on YouTube. I kind of got inspired bro. Ahem, I think I'll finish here.

Enjoy rays, and don't forget to write reviews!!

(I know this bot will probably be terrible... Sorry, my head hurts)
